004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.commons.bean;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.commons.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.commons.function.*;
023
024/**
025 * Utility classes and methods for the {@link BeanProp @BeanProp} annotation.
026 *
027 * <p>
028 * Provides a {@link Builder} that constructs a synthetic {@link BeanProp @BeanProp} annotation instance
029 * programmatically without requiring it to be declared on a program element at compile time.
030 *
031 * <p>
032 * This builder is pure-data: it captures the annotation attribute
033 * values and produces an annotation instance that is functionally equivalent to a declared one, but
034 * does <i>not</i> apply itself to a marshalling context. The application logic remains in
035 * <c>juneau-marshall</c> (see {@code MarshalledPropAnnotation} and {@code BeanPropApplyAnnotation})
036 * until later phases move that machinery down into <c>juneau-commons</c>.
037 *
038 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
039 *    <li class='ja'>{@link BeanProp}
040 *    <li class='jc'>{@link AnnotationObject}
041 * </ul>
042 */
043@SuppressWarnings({
044   "rawtypes" // Raw types required for reflective annotation application.
045})
046public class BeanPropAnnotation {
047
048   /**
049    * Prevents instantiation.
050    */
051   private BeanPropAnnotation() {}
052
053   /**
054    * Builder class.
055    */
056   public static class Builder extends AnnotationObject.Builder {
057
058      private String[] description = {};
059      private Class<?> type = void.class;
060      private Class<?> elementType = void.class;
061      private Class<?>[] params = new Class[0];
062      private Class<? extends BeanFactory> factory = BeanFactory.Void.class;
063      private String name = "";
064      private String ro = "";
065      private String summary = "";
066      private String value = "";
067      private String wo = "";
068
069      /**
070       * Constructor.
071       */
072      protected Builder() {
073         super(BeanProp.class);
074      }
075
076      /**
077       * Instantiates a new {@link BeanProp @BeanProp} object initialized with this builder.
078       *
079       * @return A new {@link BeanProp @BeanProp} object.
080       */
081      public BeanProp build() {
082         return new Object(this);
083      }
084
085      /**
086       * Sets the description property on this annotation.
087       *
088       * @param value The new value for this property.
089       * @return This object.
090       */
091      public Builder description(String...value) {
092         description = value;
093         return this;
094      }
095
096      /**
097       * Sets the {@link BeanProp#elementType()} property on this annotation.
098       *
099       * @param value The new value for this property.
100       * @return This object.
101       */
102      public Builder elementType(Class<?> value) {
103         elementType = value;
104         return this;
105      }
106
107      /**
108       * Sets the {@link BeanProp#factory()} property on this annotation.
109       *
110       * @param value The new value for this property.
111       * @return This object.
112       */
113      public Builder factory(Class<? extends BeanFactory> value) {
114         factory = value;
115         return this;
116      }
117
118      /**
119       * Sets the {@link BeanProp#name()} property on this annotation.
120       *
121       * @param value The new value for this property.
122       * @return This object.
123       */
124      public Builder name(String value) {
125         name = value;
126         return this;
127      }
128
129      /**
130       * Sets the {@link BeanProp#params()} property on this annotation.
131       *
132       * @param value The new value for this property.
133       * @return This object.
134       */
135      public Builder params(Class<?>...value) {
136         params = value;
137         return this;
138      }
139
140      /**
141       * Sets the {@link BeanProp#ro()} property on this annotation.
142       *
143       * @param value The new value for this property.
144       * @return This object.
145       */
146      public Builder ro(String value) {
147         ro = value;
148         return this;
149      }
150
151      /**
152       * Sets the {@link BeanProp#summary()} property on this annotation.
153       *
154       * @param value The new value for this property.
155       * @return This object.
156       * @since 10.0.0
157       */
158      public Builder summary(String value) {
159         summary = value;
160         return this;
161      }
162
163      /**
164       * Sets the {@link BeanProp#type()} property on this annotation.
165       *
166       * @param value The new value for this property.
167       * @return This object.
168       */
169      public Builder type(Class<?> value) {
170         type = value;
171         return this;
172      }
173
174      /**
175       * Sets the {@link BeanProp#value()} property on this annotation.
176       *
177       * @param value The new value for this property.
178       * @return This object.
179       */
180      public Builder value(String value) {
181         this.value = value;
182         return this;
183      }
184
185      /**
186       * Sets the {@link BeanProp#wo()} property on this annotation.
187       *
188       * @param value The new value for this property.
189       * @return This object.
190       */
191      public Builder wo(String value) {
192         wo = value;
193         return this;
194      }
195
196   }
197
198   @SuppressWarnings({
199      "java:S2160", // equals() inherited from AnnotationObject compares all annotation interface methods; subclass fields are accessed via those methods
200      "annotationSuperInterface" // Eclipse JDT: intentional concrete implementation of annotation interface for runtime-built annotation instances
201   })
202   private static class Object extends AnnotationObject implements BeanProp {
203
204      private final String[] description;
205      private final Class<?> type;
206      private final Class<?> elementType;
207      private final Class<?>[] params;
208      private final Class<? extends BeanFactory> factory;
209      private final String name;
210      private final String value;
211      private final String ro;
212      private final String summary;
213      private final String wo;
214
215      Object(BeanPropAnnotation.Builder b) {
216         super(b);
217         description = copyOf(b.description);
218         elementType = b.elementType;
219         factory = b.factory;
220         name = b.name;
221         params = copyOf(b.params);
222         ro = b.ro;
223         summary = b.summary;
224         type = b.type;
225         value = b.value;
226         wo = b.wo;
227      }
228
229      @Override /* Overridden from BeanProp */
230      public String[] description() {
231         return description;
232      }
233
234      @Override /* Overridden from BeanProp */
235      public Class<?> elementType() {
236         return elementType;
237      }
238
239      @Override /* Overridden from BeanProp */
240      public Class<? extends BeanFactory> factory() {
241         return factory;
242      }
243
244      @Override /* Overridden from BeanProp */
245      public String name() {
246         return name;
247      }
248
249      @Override /* Overridden from BeanProp */
250      public Class<?>[] params() {
251         return params;
252      }
253
254      @Override /* Overridden from BeanProp */
255      public String ro() {
256         return ro;
257      }
258
259      @Override /* Overridden from BeanProp */
260      public String summary() {
261         return summary;
262      }
263
264      @Override /* Overridden from BeanProp */
265      public Class<?> type() {
266         return type;
267      }
268
269      @Override /* Overridden from BeanProp */
270      public String value() {
271         return value;
272      }
273
274      @Override /* Overridden from BeanProp */
275      public String wo() {
276         return wo;
277      }
278   }
279
280   /** Default value */
281   public static final BeanProp DEFAULT = create().build();
282
283   /**
284    * Instantiates a new builder for this class.
285    *
286    * @return A new builder object.
287    */
288   public static Builder create() {
289      return new Builder();
290   }
291}
